message:
feat(supervision): add restart policies and supervision configuration

Extends the supervision module with OTP-style restart strategies:

RestartPolicy enum:
- OneForOne: Only restart the failed child (default)
- OneForAll: Restart all children when one fails
- RestForOne: Restart failed child and all children started after it

EscalationPolicy enum:
- Stop: Permanently stop the failing actor (default)
- Escalate: Propagate failure to parent supervisor
- ResetCounter: Reset restart budget and retry (use with caution)

SupervisionConfig struct:
- restart_policy: How failures affect sibling children
- max_restarts: Maximum restarts within time window
- restart_window: Time window for counting restarts
- backoff: BackoffStrategy for restart delays
- escalation: What to do when budget exhausted

This enables building supervision trees with different restart
semantics based on the dependencies between child actors, following
the Erlang/OTP supervision model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
